title: Capability Palette Lab
prompt:
Create "NEXUS Capability Palette Lab", a workflow builder add-node interface. 16:9.
Left: categorized palette for Input, LLM, Image, Video, Compiler, Controller, Artifact. Center: drag preview onto graph canvas. Right: capability details, available status, missing dependency, suggested Codex task.
Show disabled future cards: Video Model, If/Else Controller, Auto Brain Apply. Make disabled states elegant and informative.
Style: dark technical UI, compact cards, clear icons, swatches, no marketing copy.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
